title: Require API Server Plugin Boundary
forbids: a missing or alternate package face beside required project.json, src, and tsconfig.json, permitted AGENTS.md and test, or a missing or alternate public source face beside api.ts, client.ts, and service
why: An API server plugin adds exactly one client face and one API face around one embedded service. Keeping that package delta small preserves the reusable service law while an owner-local TypeScript project checks exact public imports and the application host remains the sole HTTP transport owner. The agent-router blueprint independently owns whether the permitted AGENTS.md plaque is required.
remediate: Keep project.json, src, and tsconfig.json as the required plugin root faces, permit only AGENTS.md and test beside them, and keep only api.ts, client.ts, and service under src. Apply the agent-router, service, and transport packets independently to their own concerns.
message: Every API server plugin must expose one client/API pair around one embedded service boundary.
